  "text": "Pod security context validation in kubernetes/kubernetes is handled at two main layers:\n\n## 1. Pod Security Admission (Policy Layer)\nLocated in `staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/`, this is the primary enforcement layer implementing the Pod Security Standards (Baseline and Restricted levels):\n\n### runAsNonRoot enforcement\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/check_runAsNonRoot.go`: Implements `CheckRunAsNonRoot()` (restricted level) via `runAsNonRoot_1_0()` which checks both pod-level `spec.securityContext.runAsNonRoot` and container-level `spec.containers[*].securityContext.runAsNonRoot`.\n\n### Privileged container check\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/check_privileged.go`: Implements `CheckPrivileged()` (baseline level) via `privileged_1_0()` which forbids `securityContext.privileged=true` for all containers.\n\n### Capabilities validation\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/check_capabilities_baseline.go`: Implements `CheckCapabilitiesBaseline()` via `capabilitiesBaseline_1_0()` which checks that only default-set capabilities are added.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/check_capabilities_restricted.go`: Implements `CheckCapabilitiesRestricted()` via `capabilitiesRestricted_1_22()` and `capabilitiesRestricted_1_25()` which enforce dropping ALL capabilities and only allowing NET_BIND_SERVICE to be added.\n\n### seccompProfile enforcement\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/check_seccompProfile_baseline.go`: Implements `CheckSeccompBaseline()` via `seccompProfileBaseline_1_0()` (annotation-based) and `seccompProfileBaseline_1_19()` (field-based) which allow only RuntimeDefault, Localhost, and docker/default profiles.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/check_seccompProfile_restricted.go`: Implements `CheckSeccompProfileRestricted()` via `seccompProfileRestricted_1_19()` and `seccompProfileRestricted_1_25()` which require a seccompProfile to be explicitly set.\n\n## 2. API Server Validation (Core Validation Layer)\nLocated in `pkg/apis/core/validation/validation.go`:\n- `ValidateSecurityContext()` at line 7452: Validates container security context including `Privileged` (checking against cluster policy), `SeccompProfile` field, and `Capabilities.Add` interaction with `allowPrivilegeEscalation=false`.\n- `validateSeccompProfileField()`, `ValidateSeccompProfile()`, `ValidateSeccompPodAnnotations()`, `validateSeccompProfileType()`: Validate seccomp profile format/type.\n- `validateSeccompAnnotationsAndFields()`, `validateSeccompAnnotationsAndFieldsMatch()`: Validate consistency between seccomp annotations and fields.\n- `validatePodSpecSecurityContext()`: Validates pod-level security context.\n\n## 3. Kubelet Runtime Enforcement\nThe kubelet enforces security at runtime:\n- `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/security_context_others.go`: `verifyRunAsNonRoot()` actually enforces the runAsNonRoot policy at container start time by checking the effective UID.\n- `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/security_context_windows.go`: Windows version of `verifyRunAsNonRoot()`.\n- `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/security_context.go`: `convertToRuntimeCapabilities()` converts capabilities to the CRI runtime format; `determineEffectiveSecurityContext()` merges pod and container security contexts.\n- `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/helpers.go`: `fieldSeccompProfile()` and `getSeccompProfile()` resolve the effective seccomp profile for containers.\n\n## 4. Security Context Accessors\n- `pkg/securitycontext/accessors.go`: Provides accessors for `RunAsNonRoot`, `SeccompProfile`, `Capabilities`, and `Privileged` on both pod and container security contexts.\n- `pkg/securitycontext/util.go`: `DetermineEffectiveSecurityContext()` merges pod-level and container-level security contexts."

    85→

    91→
    92→		droppedAll := false
    93→		for _, c := range container.SecurityContext.Capabilities.Drop {

    95→				droppedAll = true
    96→				break
    97→			}
    98→		}
    99→		if !droppedAll {
   100→			containersMissingDropAll = append(containersMissingDropAll, container.Name)

   124→			pluralize("container", "containers", len(containersAddingForbidden)),
   125→			joinQuote(containersAddingForbidden),
   126→			joinQuote(forbiddenCapabilities.List())))
   127→	}

   138→func capabilitiesRestricted_1_25(podMetadata *metav1.ObjectMeta, podSpec *corev1.PodSpec) CheckResult {

    71→	var badSetters []string
    72→	badValues := sets.NewString()
    73→
    74→	podSeccompSet := false
    75→
    76→	if podSpec.SecurityContext != nil && podSpec.SecurityContext.SeccompProfile != nil {

    83→	}

   140→		}
   141→	}
